title: Playground Checklist Workspace
concept: A compact enterprise SaaS workspace that turns Playground discovery into an ordered runbook: start a site, save it, manage saved sessions, inspect Site Manager tools, and package work through a contextual drawer beside the active WordPress preview.
flows: Start a new Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprint shortcuts, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with name, storage selection, and visible file-copy progress.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from a fleet table and contextual saved drawer with open, rename, and delete actions.
Navigate the active WordPress site with path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin controls while the embedded preview remains visible.
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser and code editing, Blueprint bundle controls, database tools, logs, export, and download actions.
Browse all 43 Blueprint gallery entries with captured category filters and featured shortcuts.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
